plugins.name: Aura Sample Plugin
plugins.description: Sample plugin bundled with Aura OS for Phase 6 testing.

plugins.name: Claude Artifacts Sync
plugins.description: Enables full sync and local rendering of Claude App Artifacts directly inside the Aura Work desktop interface.

plugins.name: OpenAI Codex Integration
plugins.description: Connects your OpenAI Codex session to local workspace agents to automate code generation and explanations.

plugins.name: Google Search Engine
plugins.description: Gives your local agent the ability to search the web using Google Custom Search API.

plugins.name: Spotify Controller
plugins.description: Allows the agent to control your local Spotify playback using the Spotify Web API.
